RU_SPAN.label: Spanning reads
RU_SPAN.description: Number of spanning reads consistent with the allele

RNC.label: Reason No Call
RNC.description: Reason for No Call in GT: . = n/a, M = Missing data, P = Partial data, I = gVCF input site is non-called, D = insufficient Depth of coverage, - = unrepresentable overlapping deletion, L = Lost/unrepresentable allele (other than deletion), U = multiple Unphased variants present, O = multiple Overlapping variants present, 1 = site is Monoallelic, no assertion about presence of REF or ALT allele

VI.label: Inheritance
VI.description: An enumeration of possible inheritance modes based on the pedigree of the sample. Potential values: AD, AD_IP, AR, AR_C, XLR, XLD, YL, MT

RU_CI.label: Repeat CI
RU_CI.description: Confidence interval for the number of repeat units spanned by the allele

nestedAttributes.prefix: Consequence annotations from Ensembl VEP. Format:

ALLELE_NUM.label: Allele Nr.
ALLELE_NUM.description: Allele nr within the VCF file.

ALPHSCORE.label: AlphScore
ALPHSCORE.description: AlphScore pathogenicity score for missense variants

apogee_Score.label: Apogee score
apogee_Score.description: Apogee score for protein coding mtDNA variants

apogee_Uscore.label: Apogee unbiased score
apogee_Uscore.description: Apogee unbiased score for protein coding mtDNA variants

clinVar_CLNSIG.label: ClinVar
clinVar_CLNSIG.description: Clinical significance for this single variant

Other.label: Other
Other.description: Classifications that do not match the common categorical values.

clinVar_CLNSIGINCL.label: ClinVar variant combination
clinVar_CLNSIGINCL.description: Clinical significance for a haplotype or genotype that includes this variant

practice_guideline.label: Practice guideline
practice_guideline.description: There is a submitted record with a classification from a practice guideline

reviewed_by_expert_panel.label: Reviewed by expert panel
reviewed_by_expert_panel.description: There is a submitted record with a classification from an expert panel

criteria_provided.label: Criteria provided
criteria_provided.description: Assertion criteria and evidence for the classification (or a public contact) were provided

_multiple_submitters.label: Multiple submitters
_multiple_submitters.description: There are multiple submitted records with a classification

_single_submitter.label: Single submitter
_single_submitter.description: There is a single submitted record with a classification

no_assertion_criteria_provided.label: No assertion criteria provided
no_assertion_criteria_provided.description: There are one or more submitted records with a classification but without assertion criteria and evidence for the classification (or a public contact)

no_classification_for_the_single_variant.label: No classification for the single variant

Consequence.label: Effect
Consequence.description: Effect(s) described as Sequence Ontology term(s)

transcript_ablation.label: transcript ablation
transcript_ablation.description: A feature ablation whereby the deleted region includes a transcript feature

splice_acceptor_variant.label: splice acceptor variant
splice_acceptor_variant.description: A splice variant that changes the 2 base region at the 3' end of an intron

splice_donor_variant.label: splice donor variant
splice_donor_variant.description: A splice variant that changes the 2 base region at the 5' end of an intron

stop_gained.label: stop gained
stop_gained.description: A sequence variant whereby at least one base of a codon is changed, resulting in a premature stop codon, leading to a shortened transcript

frameshift_variant.label: frameshift variant
frameshift_variant.description: A sequence variant which causes a disruption of the translational reading frame, because the number of nucleotides inserted or deleted is not a multiple of three

stop_lost.label: stop lost
stop_lost.description: A sequence variant where at least one base of the terminator codon (stop) is changed, resulting in an elongated transcript

start_lost.label: start lost
start_lost.description: A codon variant that changes at least one base of the canonical start codon

transcript_amplification.label: transcript amplification
transcript_amplification.description: A feature amplification of a region containing a transcript

feature_elongation.label: feature elongation
feature_elongation.description: A sequence variant that causes the extension of a genomic feature, with regard to the reference sequence

feature_truncation.label: feature truncation
feature_truncation.description: A sequence variant that causes the reduction of a genomic feature, with regard to the reference sequence

inframe_insertion.label: inframe insertion
inframe_insertion.description: An inframe non synonymous variant that inserts bases into in the coding sequence

inframe_deletion.label: inframe deletion
inframe_deletion.description: An inframe non synonymous variant that deletes bases from the coding sequence

missense_variant.label: missense variant
missense_variant.description: A sequence variant, that changes one or more bases, resulting in a different amino acid sequence but where the length is preserved

protein_altering_variant.label: protein altering variant
protein_altering_variant.description: A sequence_variant which is predicted to change the protein encoded in the coding sequence

splice_donor_5th_base_variant.label: splice donor 5th base variant
splice_donor_5th_base_variant.description: A sequence variant that causes a change at the 5th base pair after the start of the intron in the orientation of the transcript

splice_region_variant.label: splice region variant
splice_region_variant.description: A sequence variant in which a change has occurred within the region of the splice site, either within 1-3 bases of the exon or 3-8 bases of the intron

splice_donor_region_variant.label: splice donor region variant
splice_donor_region_variant.description: A sequence variant that falls in the region between the 3rd and 6th base after splice junction (5' end of intron)

splice_polypyrimidine_tract_variant.label: splice polypyrimidine tract variant
splice_polypyrimidine_tract_variant.description: A sequence variant that falls in the polypyrimidine tract at 3' end of intron between 17 and 3 bases from the end (acceptor -3 to acceptor -17)

incomplete_terminal_codon_variant.label: incomplete terminal codon variant
incomplete_terminal_codon_variant.description: A sequence variant where at least one base of the final codon of an incompletely annotated transcript is changed

start_retained_variant.label: start retained variant
start_retained_variant.description: A sequence variant where at least one base in the start codon is changed, but the start remains

stop_retained_variant.label: stop retained variant
stop_retained_variant.description: A sequence variant where at least one base in the terminator codon is changed, but the terminator remains

synonymous_variant.label: synonymous variant
synonymous_variant.description: A sequence variant where there is no resulting change to the encoded amino acid

coding_sequence_variant.label: coding sequence variant
coding_sequence_variant.description: A sequence variant that changes the coding sequence

mature_miRNA_variant.label: mature miRNA variant
mature_miRNA_variant.description: A transcript variant located with the sequence of the mature miRNA

5_prime_UTR_variant.label: 5 prime UTR variant
5_prime_UTR_variant.description: A UTR variant of the 5' UTR

3_prime_UTR_variant.label: 3 prime UTR variant
3_prime_UTR_variant.description: A UTR variant of the 3' UTR

non_coding_transcript_exon_variant.label: non coding transcript exon variant
non_coding_transcript_exon_variant.description: A sequence variant that changes non-coding exon sequence in a non-coding transcript

intron_variant.label: intron variant
intron_variant.description: A transcript variant occurring within an intron

NMD_transcript_variant.label: NMD transcript variant
NMD_transcript_variant.description: A variant in a transcript that is the target of NMD

non_coding_transcript_variant.label: non coding transcript variant
non_coding_transcript_variant.description: A transcript variant of a non coding RNA gene

coding_transcript_variant.label: coding transcript variant
coding_transcript_variant.description: A transcript variant of a protein coding gene

upstream_gene_variant.label: upstream gene variant
upstream_gene_variant.description: A sequence variant located 5' of a gene

downstream_gene_variant.label: downstream gene variant
downstream_gene_variant.description: A sequence variant located 3' of a gene

TFBS_ablation.label: TFBS ablation
TFBS_ablation.description: A feature ablation whereby the deleted region includes a transcription factor binding site

TFBS_amplification.label: TFBS amplification
TFBS_amplification.description: A feature amplification of a region containing a transcription factor binding site

TF_binding_site_variant.label: TF binding site variant
TF_binding_site_variant.description: A sequence variant located within a transcription factor binding site

regulatory_region_ablation.label: regulatory region ablation
regulatory_region_ablation.description: A feature ablation whereby the deleted region includes a regulatory region

regulatory_region_amplification.label: regulatory region amplification
regulatory_region_amplification.description: A feature amplification of a region containing a regulatory region

regulatory_region_variant.label: regulatory region variant
regulatory_region_variant.description: A sequence variant located within a regulatory region

intergenic_variant.label: intergenic variant
intergenic_variant.description: A sequence variant located in the intergenic region, between genes

sequence_variant.label: sequence variant
sequence_variant.description: A sequence_variant is a non exact copy of a sequence_feature or genome exhibiting one or more sequence_alteration

FATHMM_MKL_NC.label: FATHMM-MKL-NC
FATHMM_MKL_NC.description: Predict the Functional Consequences of Non-Coding Single Nucleotide Variants (SNVs)

GDB_PRO.label: GDB_PRO
GDB_PRO.description: Highest GREEN-DB constraint score for overlapping promotor regions.

GDB_ENH.label: GDB_ENH
GDB_ENH.description: Highest GREEN-DB constraint score for overlapping enhancer regions.

GDB_BIV.label: GDB_BIV
GDB_BIV.description: Highest GREEN-DB constraint score for overlapping bivalent regions.

GDB_SIL.label: GDB_SIL
GDB_SIL.description: Highest GREEN-DB constraint score for overlapping silencer regions.

GDB_INS.label: GDB_INS
GDB_INS.description: Highest GREEN-DB constraint score for overlapping insulater regions.

GDB_CGN.label: GDB_GENES
GDB_CGN.description: Genes controlled by the GREEN-DB region with the highest constraint score

GADO_PD.label: GADO_PD
GADO_PD.description: Gene-phenotypes association based on the GeneNetwork Assisted Diagnostic Optimization (GADO) gene prioritization Z-scores, see https://www.genenetwork.nl/gado and https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-019-10649-4

HC.label: High confidence
HC.description: Gene phenotype relation predicted by GADO with high confidence; Z-Score greater than 5

LC.label: Low confidence
LC.description: Gene phenotype relation predicted by GADO with low confidence; Z-Score greater than 3 but below 5

GADO_SC.label: GADO_SC
GADO_SC.description: The combined prioritization GADO Z-score over the HPO of the proband(s) terms for this case.

gnomAD_COV.label: gnomAD COV
gnomAD_COV.description: gnomAD coverage (percent of individuals in gnomAD source)

gnomAD_QC.label: gnomAD QC
gnomAD_QC.description: gnomAD quality control filters that failed

HGVSc.label: HGVS C
HGVSc.description: HGVS nomenclature: coding DNA reference sequence

hmtvar_DiseaseScore.label: HmtVar disease score
hmtvar_DiseaseScore.description: HmtVar disease score for mtDNA tRNA variants

HPO.label: HPO
HPO.description: Human Phenotype Ontology (HPO) terms describing phenotypic abnormalities, see https://hpo.jax.org/ and https://doi.org/10.1093/nar/gkad1005

IMPACT.label: Impact
IMPACT.description: The Impact as predicted by VEP

IncompletePenetrance.label: Gene: Inc.Pen.
IncompletePenetrance.description: Is gene associated with incomplete penetrance?

1.label: True
1.description: Gene is associated with incomplete penetrance

mitoTip_Score.label: MitoTip Score
mitoTip_Score.description: MitoTIP score for mtDNA tRNA variants

ncER.label: ncER
ncER.description: Non-coding essential regulation, from: 0(probably not essential for regulation) to 100 (probably essential for regulation).

PICK.label: PICK
PICK.description: Boolean indicating if this is the VEP picked transcript.

ReMM.label: ReMM
ReMM.description: The Regulatory Mendelian Mutation (ReMM) score was created for relevance prediction of non-coding variations (SNVs and small InDels) in the human genome (hg19) in terms of Mendelian diseases.

VIPC.label: VIP classification
VIPC.description: Variant consequence classification predicted by the Variant Interpretation Pipeline (VIP), see https://vip.molgeniscloud.org/ and https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.04.11.24305656

VKGL_CL.label: VKGL
VKGL_CL.description: Variant consensus classification from the Vereniging Klinisch Genetische Laboratoriumdiagnostiek (VKGL) datashare database, see https://vkgl.nl/nl/diagnostiek/vkgl-datashare-database

STR_NORMAL_MAX.label: STR normal max
STR_NORMAL_MAX.description: Maximum number of repeats allowed to call as normal as defined in the Stranger catalogue

STR_PATHOLOGIC_MIN.label: STR pathologic min
STR_PATHOLOGIC_MIN.description: Mininum number of repeats required to call as pathologic as defined in the Stranger catalogue

STR_STATUS.label: STR status
STR_STATUS.description: Repeat expansion status as decided by Stranger

normal.label: normal
normal.description: Repeat count is smaller than or equal to the maximum number of repeats allowed to call as normal

pre_mutation.label: pre-mutation
pre_mutation.description: Repeat count is greater than the maximum number of repeats allowed to call as normal and smaller than the minimum number of repeats required to call as pathologic

full_mutation.label: full-mutation
full_mutation.description: Repeat count is greater than or equal to the minimum number of repeats required to call as pathologic

RU_CAT.label: Repeat Unit
RU_CAT.description: Repeat unit on the plus strand, as specified in the catalog.
